items.project_definition: The RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ utilizing a standardized envelope for data, metadata, and errors.
The httpx non-blocking request handler used within the test suite to validate endpoints.
The mandatory lightweight data-interchange format for all system responses.
The security token mechanism featuring a 15-minute short-term access window and a 7-day renewal period.
The exclusive abstraction layer for database interactions, forbidding direct query execution.
The relational database engine version 16 used for both production and non-mocked testing environments.
The mandatory runtime environment for all implementation work.
The provided library for integrating transactional email delivery via the external provider.
The structured query language which is strictly prohibited in its raw form for data access.
The asynchronous toolkit used for object-relational mapping and database session management.
